description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large, horizontally-aligned windows on both floors, providing ample natural light and a sleek appearance. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray tones, with a prominent black accent section and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The property is landscaped with green lawns and several palm trees, enhancing its contemporary urban appeal. A small blue car is parked in the driveway, and the front entrance is set back beneath an overhanging upper floor. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed bungalow with large horizontal windows, white and gray exterior, and landscaped lawns with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, garage, and palm trees on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black accent section, garage, and a row of palm trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, extended patio area, and a large green lawn behind the house.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the layered structure, patio, and additional palm trees on the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large horizontal windows on both floors
